name: Resistance Bands Set (5 Levels)
description: Set of 5 latex resistance bands from light to extra-heavy. Includes carry bag and exercise guide.

additionalInfo.value: FlexCore Training Gear, San Diego, California 92101

reviews.title: Fantastic for travel workouts
reviews.reviewText: The bands feel durable and the range of resistance is useful for different exercises. I keep them in my bag for quick workouts and mobility sessions. Great value for the price.

reviews.title: Versatile and easy to use
reviews.reviewText: I use these for strength work, stretching, and rehab exercises. The bands are clearly labeled and the carry bag is handy. Nice quality latex and no issues so far.

reviews.title: Solid resistance band set
reviews.reviewText: Good selection of resistance levels and the material feels strong. The exercise guide is a nice bonus. I would have liked handles too, but for basic band work this set is excellent.
